projectDescription: A curated collection of exploits, bypasses, proxies, cheats, and tools for managed/enrolled Chromebooks used in school or enterprise environments.
keyFeatures: ChromeOS developer mode and unenrollment exploits (Sh1mmer, BadRecovery, FORGE, etc.)
Extension and monitoring bypass tools (GoGuardian, Securly, Hapara, iBoss)
Chrome Auto Update Blocker (CAUB) to maintain specific ChromeOS versions
Network filter bypasses via custom DNS and VPN exploits
Skiovox kiosk app file manager breakout (works on v118 through v144)
Webview exploits to access unmanaged browser contexts
Collection of proxy/unblocker links (Rammerhead, Hypertabs, Scramjet, etc.)
Game cheats for Blooket, Edpuzzle, Gimkit, Kahoot, Quizlet, and more
Web OS environments and in-browser virtual machines
Alternative links for commonly blocked sites (YouTube, Reddit, GitHub, etc.)
Tutorials for hosting proxies via Vercel, FreeDNS, and BYOD
publicApiSurface: Unenrollment exploits: Sh1mmer, BadRecovery, FORGE, Quicksilver, Deenterprise, BR1CK
CAUB (Chrome Auto Update Blocker) via ONC file import at chrome://network
Skiovox kiosk breakout (v118–v144) via Certificates → File Manager
GoGuardian Hard Disable (XSS via blocked.goguardian.com cookie overflow)
GoGuardian Tab/Lock bypasses, Securly Killcurly 1/2/3, Hapara Focus bypass
Network Filter Bypass via custom DNS (8.8.8.8 / 1.1.1.1)
LTBEEF / LTMEAT service worker extension disable exploits
Webview exploits: Chrome-Signin, TestNav, Edcite, Edulastic, College Board
Proxies: Rammerhead, Hypertabs, Scramjet, Page Sandbox
Bookmarklet runners: AdGuard, Sh0vel, Point-Blank, uBlock-based
JavaScript Executor and Tab Disguiser utilities
Web OS: AnuraOS, AaronOS, TerraOS, Windows 10/11 in browser, Codespaces VM
Game cheats: Blooket, Edpuzzle, Gimkit, Kahoot, Quizlet, Wayground/Quizizz
